input_dict.question: Carlo Emilio Gadda and Katharine Kerr both were considered what?
input_dict.source_summary: Carlo Emilio Gadda is credited as the author of Italian novels (e.g., That Awful Mess on Via Merulana) and Katharine Kerr is an American science fiction and fantasy novelist; both were novelists.
input_dict.target_summary: First-hop evidence noted that Carlo Emilio Gadda authored an Italian novel. Second-hop (gold) evidence identifies Carlo Emilio Gadda (1893–1973) as an Italian writer and poet who "belongs to the tradition of the language innovators, writers that played with the somewhat stiff standard pre-war Italian language, and added elements of dialects, technical jargon and wordplay." Second-hop (gold) evidence identifies Katharine Kerr (born 1944) as an American science fiction and fantasy novelist, best known for her series of Celtic-influenced high fantasy novels set in the fictional land of Deverry.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Carlo Emilio Gadda was an Italian writer and poet who authored Italian novels, and Katharine Kerr is an American science fiction and fantasy novelist; both were novelists.

request.rendered_prompt:
You are evaluating the LOCAL output quality of the summary2 agent in a
multi-agent HotpotQA pipeline.

Do not evaluate the downstream final answerer and do not use final-answer

  detail represented in the target summary.

Judge only the summaries shown below. Do not reward verbosity. Additional
facts are acceptable only when they do not contradict the source or target.

Question:
Carlo Emilio Gadda and Katharine Kerr both were considered what?

Source summary2:
Carlo Emilio Gadda is credited as the author of Italian novels (e.g., That Awful Mess on Via Merulana) and Katharine Kerr is an American science fiction and fantasy novelist; both were novelists.

Second-hop (gold) evidence identifies Katharine Kerr (born 1944) as an American science fiction and fantasy novelist, best known for her series of Celtic-influenced high fantasy novels set in the fictional land of Deverry.

Candidate summary2:
Carlo Emilio Gadda was an Italian writer and poet who authored Italian novels, and Katharine Kerr is an American science fiction and fantasy novelist; both were novelists.
